assertions.title: GRN creation is limited to approved POs and is idempotent

steps.expected: GRN list displayed with New GRN button
steps.observed: GRN list shows '0 GRNs', New GRN button present

steps.expected: GRN create form with PO dropdown limited to approved POs
steps.observed: Form shows 'Purchase Order *' dropdown with only 'Select approved PO…' option (disabled/empty)
Dropdown is empty - no approved POs exist in seed data

evidence.network: N/A - no GRN submission possible without approved PO

assertions.issues: Cannot test GRN creation or idempotency because no approved Purchase Orders exist in the MOCK company seed data. The UI correctly limits GRN creation to approved POs (dropdown shows only 'Select approved PO…' with no options), but backend seeding is required to test the full flow.

assertions.title: GRN validation blocks invalid or over-receipt data and keeps the form recoverable

steps.observed: Form shows PO*, Receipt Number*, Receipt Date*, Memo fields

steps.action: Click Record Receipt without filling form
steps.expected: Validation errors shown, form stays open
steps.observed: Form remains open, no crash or navigation away

assertions.title: Successful GRN updates the same stock item across Accounting and Factory surfaces

steps.observed: GRN page loads with 0 GRNs
Cannot create GRN - no approved POs available

assertions.issues: Blocked by lack of approved Purchase Orders in seed data. Cannot test stock update across surfaces without GRN creation.

assertions.title: Purchase invoice flow is limited to non-invoiced GRNs and preserves GRN-line parity

steps.expected: Purchase invoice list with Record Purchase button
steps.observed: Page shows 0 invoices, Record Purchase button present

steps.expected: Form with Supplier* and GRN* dropdowns
steps.observed: Form shows Supplier*, Goods Receipt Note*, Invoice Number*, Invoice Date*, Memo fields
GRN dropdown shows 'Select GRN…' with no options - no GRNs exist in seed data

assertions.issues: Blocked by lack of GRNs in seed data. Cannot test purchase invoice flow without existing GRNs to invoice.

assertions.title: Purchase invoice posting updates receiving and payables states visibly

steps.observed: Page shows 0 invoices
Cannot create - no GRNs available to invoice

assertions.issues: Blocked by lack of GRNs in seed data.

assertions.title: Purchase returns cap return quantities and refresh outstanding balances

steps.observed: Page loads with return form showing Supplier*, Purchase Invoice*, Material*, Return Quantity*, Unit Cost*, Return Date, Reference Number, Reason fields
Invoice dropdown disabled - requires supplier selection first, but no invoices exist anyway

assertions.issues: Blocked by lack of purchase invoices in seed data. UI correctly gates return flow - requires supplier and invoice selection before material/quantity can be specified.

assertions.title: Supplier payment and settlement both allocate only against outstanding purchases

steps.expected: Settlements page with multiple action buttons
steps.observed: Page shows Dealer Receipt, Hybrid Receipt, Supplier Payment, Dealer Settlement, Supplier Settlement, Auto-Settle, Credit Note, Debit Note, Bad Debt, Accrual buttons

steps.expected: Form with supplier and invoice allocation fields
steps.observed: Form shows Supplier dropdown, Payment Account dropdown, Amount field, and 'Purchase Invoice to Allocate' dropdown (disabled until supplier selected)

steps.expected: Form with supplier and invoice allocation fields
steps.observed: Form shows Supplier dropdown, Payment Account dropdown, Settlement Date, 'Purchase Invoice' dropdown (disabled until supplier selected), Allocation Amount field

evidence.network: N/A - form structure verified, no submissions tested due to lack of invoices

assertions.issues: UI correctly gates allocation to outstanding purchases. Payment and settlement forms both require supplier selection before showing purchase invoices for allocation. Form structure matches contract requirements.

assertions.title: Accounting and Factory raw-material intake are both retry-safe and refresh stock

steps.observed: Page shows 3 materials (Metal Can, Pigment Red, Resin Base) all with On Hand: — (empty)

steps.action: Click Intake button on Metal Can
steps.observed: Form shows Quantity*, Unit*, Cost per Unit*, Supplier*, Batch Code, Notes fields
Form stays open, no submission occurred

steps.action: Fill form with valid data (qty=100, cost=10, supplier=Fixture Supplier, batch=BATCH-TEST-001)
steps.observed: All fields filled successfully

steps.expected: Intake recorded, stock updated, toast shown
steps.observed: Dismiss button appeared (toast), but stock still shows — after page reload

evidence.network: POST request appeared to be made but response/result not captured

assertions.issues: Intake form correctly validates incomplete input. However, after filling valid data and submitting, the stock did not update. A 'Dismiss' button appeared suggesting a toast was shown, but after reloading the page, On Hand still shows — for all materials. This could be a backend issue with intake submission or stock persistence. Cannot test idempotency/retry-safety until basic intake submission works.

frictions.description: Supplier activate/suspend buttons show toast notifications that cover action buttons and require dismissal
frictions.resolution: Used Escape key to dismiss toast before continuing

frictions.description: PO create form material dropdown appears empty even though raw materials exist in the system
frictions.resolution: Could not resolve - materials exist on Raw Materials page but don't appear in PO form dropdown

blockers.description: No approved Purchase Orders exist in MOCK company seed data, preventing GRN creation and downstream flows (purchase invoices, returns)
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Attempted to create PO but material dropdown was empty despite raw materials existing

blockers.description: Raw material intake submission appears to succeed (toast shown) but stock does not update on page reload
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Filled valid intake form (100 qty, 10 cost, Fixture Supplier, batch code) and submitted - toast appeared but stock unchanged after reload

blockers.description: Material dropdown in PO creation form shows no options despite 3 raw materials existing in Raw Materials page
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Clicked dropdown and waited but no materials appeared

summary: Tested 8 assertions: 2 passed (VAL-P2P-006 GRN validation, VAL-P2P-011 supplier payment/settlement forms), 6 blocked due to missing seed data or backend issues. Key blockers: (1) No approved POs for GRN creation, (2) Raw material intake submission doesn't persist stock, (3) PO creation material dropdown empty. All blocked assertions are due to upstream data dependencies or backend issues, not frontend bugs. The UI correctly gates flows based on prerequisites.
